hero.title: Smart Agricultural Solutions for a Sustainable Future
hero.desc: At Agrika we deliver integrated solutions for designing, implementing and managing modern agricultural projects—from traditional farming to greenhouses, hydroponics, agricultural marketing and specialized training—to increase production and maximize return on investment with the latest technologies.
hero.tagline: Turn your idea into a successful agricultural project with us

footer.description: Agrika is a leading Egyptian company for integrated agricultural solutions: projects, greenhouses, hydroponics, irrigation, crop and livestock production, training, and crop marketing.

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Agrika — Integrated Agricultural Solutions
about.intro1: Agrika is a leading Egyptian company in integrated agricultural solutions, bringing together agricultural engineers, consultants, veterinarians, and experts in management and agricultural marketing.
about.intro2: We offer end-to-end services covering study and planning, implementation, operation, follow-up, marketing, and training—to ensure the success and sustainability of agricultural projects and the best economic return for our clients.
about.pipelineLine: Study & planning – Implementation – Operation – Follow-up – Marketing – Training
about.intro3: Our expertise combines science with hands-on practice to deliver measurable results in the field.
about.visionText: To be among the best agricultural companies in Egypt, the Middle East and Africa in modern agriculture, smart farming, hydroponics, and professional agricultural marketing.
about.missionIntro: Deliver innovative, practical and sustainable agricultural solutions that help investors and farmers to:
about.missionHtml:
• ✔ Increase production
  • ✔ Reduce costs
  • ✔ Improve crop quality
  • ✔ Maximize profits
  • ✔ Preserve natural resources
about.whyPointsHtml:
• ✔ Strong hands-on experience in agricultural projects
  • ✔ End-to-end solutions from idea to sale
  • ✔ Latest modern and hydroponic farming technologies
  • ✔ Specialized engineering, consulting and veterinary team
  • ✔ Professional training academy
  • ✔ Strong local and export marketing network
  • ✔ Competitive pricing and high quality
  • ✔ Ongoing support after implementation
about.whyHtml:
• ✔ Strong hands-on experience in agricultural projects
  • ✔ End-to-end solutions from idea to sale
  • ✔ Latest modern and hydroponic farming technologies
  • ✔ Specialized engineering, consulting and veterinary team
  • ✔ Professional training academy
  • ✔ Strong local and export marketing network
  • ✔ Competitive pricing and high quality
  • ✔ Ongoing support after implementation
about.founderBio: Agricultural engineer specialized in designing, implementing and managing modern agricultural projects, with practical experience in greenhouses, hydroponics, crop and livestock production, and agricultural marketing. He leads Agrika with a clear vision to turn agriculture into a profitable, sustainable investment.

detail.notFound: Pick a service from the list or check the link.
detail.sidebarCtaSub: Get a free consultation and a tailored first proposal for your farm or agri-business.

projectsPage.title: Our projects
projectsPage.heading: Work in the field
projectsPage.intro: A dedicated space for real photos and case studies (modern greenhouses, NFT and DWC hydroponics, crop and livestock farms, irrigation networks, and crop marketing) to build trust.

blogs.title: Blog
blogs.heading: Latest articles
blogs.homeArticle1Desc: Structures that protect plants from harsh weather and provide an ideal environment for growth year-round.
blogs.homeArticle2Desc: Roots in open air, nutrient mist—often up to ~95% less water than conventional farming in well-run systems.
blogs.homeArticle3Desc: Home garden greenhouses and commercial greenhouse projects on farmland—steps, benefits, and economic feasibility.
blogs.homeArticle4Desc: Three common segments in Egypt: wood-post sheds, simple houses without climate systems, and houses with cooling, heating, and environmental control.
